task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris main menu or loading screen is visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: Navigated to the correct category containing Photo Hunter
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'fun' category (indicated by the Dragon/Konqi mascot) is selected in the GCompris menu.

task_completion.description: The Photo Hunter activity is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Photo Hunter activity interface is visible, showing two side-by-side images for comparison.

task_completion.description: The first level is successfully completed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris success screen/animation (e.g., smiling flower, glowing indicators, or level transition) is displayed after finding the differences in the first level.

task_completion.description: A screenshot of the success screen is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or image viewer shows a file named 'photo_hunter_success.png' located in '/home/ga/' containing the image of the success screen.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GCompris GUI to play the game
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor movements and clicks are visible within the GCompris application to select the differences.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the agent's gameplay
integrity.visual_evidence: The image in 'photo_hunter_success.png' exactly matches the success screen state achieved by the agent in the GCompris window, rather than a generic or downloaded image.

integrity.description: The screenshot was not generated or spoofed via terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a screenshot tool or standard OS shortcut to capture the screen, rather than using ImageMagick or python scripts to create a fake success image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The activity name is officially 'Photo Hunter'. It is located in the 'fun' category, which is represented by the Dragon/Konqi mascot (not Puzzles/Panda). Level 1 of Photo Hunter contains exactly 3 differences to find. The VLM should verify that the agent finds 3 differences to trigger the success screen.
